name: tui-use
description: TUI automation for AI agents - interact with REPLs, interactive installers, and TUI applications

interface.shortDescription: Operate REPLs, installers, and TUI apps from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use tui-use to start an interactive terminal program in a PTY, observe clean screen snapshots, send keystrokes, and clean up the session when finished.
defaultPrompt: Use tui-use to interact with an interactive installer.
Use tui-use to drive a REPL and inspect the terminal snapshot.
Use tui-use to navigate a TUI program.
